channel.title: ipfs on Thibault Meunier
channel.description: Recent content in ipfs on Thibault Meunier

item.title: Chromium support for the Distributed Web
item.description: Chromium safelist dweb URL schemes Today, as part of a PR by Frederic Wand, Chromium allows website to register their ability to support distributed web URL schemes. Website gateways, such as Cloudflare IPFS Gateway or IPFS.io would be able to use Chrome navigator API to serve Native DWeb URLs. These new schemes are the following | Organisation | scheme | Example URL | |:————:|:——:|:———–:| |Cabal Club| cabal | - | | Dat Foundation | dat | dat://778f8d955175c92e4ced5e4f5563f69bfec0c86cc6f670352c457943666fe639/dat_intro.
